profile.headline: Databricks Specialist | Data Engineering | Data Analytics | Tech Pre-Sales Leader
profile.summary: Databricks Solutions Architect with 19+ years in data engineering and 6+ years in customer-facing pre-sales and consulting, specializing in cloud-based analytics, data visualization, and lakehouse architecture. Delivered a live Databricks AI/BI Genie demo that won the Capital Group engagement against four major competitors — showcasing the power of natural language analytics on enterprise data. Led high-impact client engagements across Capital Group, TD Bank, Moody's, Johnson & Johnson, Rocket Mortgage, BCBS, Nissan North America, Caterpillar, Essent Mortgage and Wells Fargo — winning deals, delivering POCs, and driving enterprise-wide platform adoption. Architected and demonstrated end-to-end Databricks solutions using Spark, Python, SQL, and Unity Catalog on AWS/Azure, translating complex technical capabilities into business outcomes for executive stakeholders. Built a Databricks Center of Excellence, trained and certified 50+ engineers, and partnered with leadership to achieve Silver Partner status. Published thought leader with a track record of enabling clients through workshops, Genie demos, AI/BI Dashboard presentations, and technical collateral across data engineering, data analytics, AI/ML, governance, and streaming.
profile.work_authorization: Canadian Citizen, Green Card EAD (GC expected May 2026)

work_experience.description: Leading Databricks platform strategy and delivery for Capital Group's Enterprise Data Office (EDO). Spearheading pre-sales, POC delivery, and enterprise Databricks adoption. Built Databricks Center of Excellence and drove company-wide partnership and certification programs.

highlights.description: Delivered a live Databricks Genie demo during pre-sales that won the Capital Group engagement over Accenture, KPMG, Capgemini, and Infosys
Successfully executed POC with the Quants team at Capital Group, leading to award of the full Databricks onboarding project for EDO
highlights.impact_metric: POC converted to full enterprise project

highlights.description: Championed Databricks partnership with Alliances and Partnerships team at Lumenalta, elevating Lumenalta from no partnership to Silver Partner status
Built Databricks Center of Excellence from scratch inside Lumenalta with training programs, best practices, and delivery frameworks
Drove company-wide Databricks certification initiative resulting in 50+ certified employees and 2 Databricks MVPs
Leading Databricks onboarding for EDO teams at Capital Group including platform architecture, data engineering, and governance
Delivering pre-sales demos and training programs on Genie, AI/BI Dashboards, Databricks Apps, and AgentBricks to win new client engagements

work_experience.industry: IT Consulting / Financial Services / Insurance / Healthcare
work_experience.description: 11+ year tenure delivering data engineering including Hortonworks, AWS,  Databricks solutions across major enterprise clients including Guardian Life, Johnson & Johnson, FIS Global, TD Bank, Moody's, Rocket Mortgage, Essent Mortgage, Nissan, BCBS, Wells Fargo, and more.

highlights.description: Built end-to-end frameworks for data Ingestion, Orchestration, and ETL in Databricks for TD Bank. Onboarded Unity Catalog for the Data Governance team, establishing centralized access controls, lineage tracking, and audit policies
highlights.impact_metric: Full Databricks framework + Unity Catalog governance

highlights.description: Enabled and optimized Databricks environments for Guardian Life, improving cross-team collaboration and cutting query times by 40% through cluster tuning, job optimization, and workspace governance
Diagnosed and resolved critical Spark bottlenecks for Johnson & Johnson's data pipelines, achieving a 3x throughput boost through partition optimization, broadcast joins, and caching strategies
Architected and provisioned Databricks infrastructure using Terraform for FIS Global, enabling repeatable, version-controlled environment deployments across dev, staging, and production

Designed fully serverless data architecture for Moody's Analytics using AWS Lambda, Glue, Step Functions, and DynamoDB, eliminating server management overhead and enabling event-driven data processing
Led Essent Mortgage's 15-year legacy system migration to AWS (with Quantiphi), re-architecting batch and streaming pipelines, achieving 50% faster data processing and 35% infrastructure cost savings

Migrated Hortonworks-based data pipelines to AWS Glue at Rocket Mortgage, drove organization-wide Glue adoption, delivered Spark training to engineering teams, and won multiple Hack Week awards for innovative data solutions
highlights.impact_metric: Company-wide Glue adoption + Hack Week awards

highlights.description: Migrated legacy on-prem data systems to Hadoop/Spark ecosystem for Nissan, building scalable data lake architecture for vehicle telemetry and supply chain analytics
Implemented real-time Kafka streaming pipelines and optimized SSRS reporting dashboards for BCBS, improving claims data processing speed and analytics delivery
Developed SSIS ETL solutions and data warehouse modernization for Illinois Board of Education, enabling standardized reporting across school districts
Built data integration pipelines and optimized analytical workloads for Wells Fargo's financial data platforms using Hadoop and Spark
Designed and delivered ETL frameworks and reporting solutions for Horace Mann, modernizing legacy data infrastructure to support insurance analytics

work_experience.description: Two US internships: Graduate Public Service Intern (GPSI) at the Illinois Office of Comptroller via University of Illinois, and Database Intern at CareFusion in San Diego.

highlights.description: Streamlined the 2012 Election Data using SQL Server, optimizing data management and improving query performance by implementing efficient indexing and stored procedures
Enhanced front-end systems using ColdFusion by refactoring legacy code, improving maintainability, and integrating new features that addressed user needs
Designed and developed interactive dashboards with SQL queries and ColdFusion to provide real-time insights, significantly improving decision-making efficiency
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure data integrity and security, facilitating integration of SQL Server backend with various reporting tools
Led migration of critical databases from SQL Server 2008 R2 to SQL Server 2012 at CareFusion, ensuring data integrity and minimal downtime
Modified and optimized SSIS packages for the new SQL Server 2012 environment, enhancing data integration workflows and improving performance
Performed comprehensive testing and validation of stored procedures, functions, and triggers to ensure compatibility with the upgraded SQL Server
Implemented advanced indexing strategies and query optimizations to boost database performance post-migration

work_experience.description: Data engineering and BI consulting across NTT Data (Keane), Accenture (Avanade), and Wipro — delivering solutions for global enterprise clients including Microsoft, Henkel, Caterpillar, and SuperValu.

highlights.description: Enhanced Microsoft's internal Engagement Management Tool by upgrading data pipelines to SQL Server 2008 R2, ensuring improved performance and scalability (Wipro Consultant)
Developed and deployed SSRS reports on the new SQL Server environment for Microsoft, enabling more efficient data analysis and reporting for stakeholders
Led migration of critical Oracle workloads to SQL Server 2008 R2 for Henkel, conducting detailed assessments and developing tailored migration strategies to minimize downtime (Avanade / Accenture)
Optimized SQL Server configurations post-migration for Henkel, enhancing system reliability and efficiency
Developed comprehensive reports on Caterpillar's CRM system using SSRS, providing actionable insights with real-time data feeds and automated report generation (Avanade / Accenture)

Selected through campus interview at Keane, trained in data warehousing, ETL processes, and data modeling. Contributed to SuperValu project designing and implementing DW solutions for BI and analytics
highlights.impact_metric: Data warehouse design for retail analytics

education.relevant_coursework: Management Information Systems, Database Management, Systems Analysis & Design
Industrial Engineering, Data Structures, Programming, Mathematics

projects.name: Enterprise Data Lakehouse Platform

projects.technologies: Databricks, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Terraform, AWS S3, Spark
projects.impact: Consolidated 5 disparate data systems into one platform, saving $2M annually

projects.name: Real-time Fraud Detection Pipeline
projects.description: Built a real-time streaming pipeline for detecting fraudulent transactions using ML models.
projects.technologies: Spark Streaming, Kafka, MLflow, Delta Lake, Python
projects.impact: Reduced fraud losses by 40%, processing 2M+ transactions per second with <100ms latency

projects.impact: Enabled personalized marketing campaigns that increased customer retention by 25%
